com.irurueta.numerical.polynomials.estimators.PolynomialEstimatorListener

    Package Description
    com.irurueta.numerical.polynomials.estimators  

    • Uses of PolynomialEstimatorListener in com.irurueta.numerical.polynomials.estimators

      Fields in com.irurueta.numerical.polynomials.estimators declared as PolynomialEstimatorListener 
      Modifier and Type Field and Description
      protected PolynomialEstimatorListener PolynomialEstimator.mListener
      Listener to be notified of events such as when estimation starts, ends or estimation progress changes.
      Methods in com.irurueta.numerical.polynomials.estimators that return PolynomialEstimatorListener 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      PolynomialEstimatorListener PolynomialEstimator.getListener()
      Gets listener to be notified of events such as when estimation starts, ends or estimation progress changes.

      static PolynomialEstimator PolynomialEstimator.create(int degree, List<PolynomialEvaluation> evaluations, PolynomialEstimatorListener listener)
      Creates an instance of a polynomial estimator using provided degree, evaluations, listener and default type.
